displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: •Please note that the quality of vacuum-packed rice remains unaffected should the packaging not arrive fully vacuum-sealed.

displayMetadata.name: PREPARATION
displayMetadata.value:
• Pre-cooking:
1. Rinse the rice thoroughly
2. For best result, soak rice in water for 30 minutes before cooking
• Measure:
1 cup of rice with 1.5 cups of water (ratio 1:1:5)
• Cooking method:
1. Put the soaked rice in the rice cooker
2. Add in the advised water ratio
3. Switch on cooker and wait for the rice cooker to turn from "cook" to "warm" mode
4. Allow the rice to steam for 5 minutes before serving

metaData.Key Information:
The Little Rice Company Wholegrain Brown Rice - Low GI, is a nutritious and healthy rice option, specially cultivated for a lower GI of 46 – one of the lowest in Singapore – making it ideal for those managing blood sugar levels.

Grown using sustainable farming practices, this wholegrain brown rice retains its natural bran layer, providing a rich source of fibre, vitamins, and minerals. It has a subtle barley-like flavour and a pleasantly chewy texture, making it a versatile addition to a variety of dishes.
metaData.Nutritional Data:

Dietary Fiber 1.5g
Total Sugars 3.0g
Protein 9.2g
Vitamin D 0mcg
Calcium 5mg
Iron 1mg
Potassium 167mg
metaData.Preparation:
• No pre-soaking required, prepare like white rice.
• Rinse lightly until water is clear.
• 2 cups pf water 1 cup of rice.
• Adjust for desired rice texture.
• Stir cooked rice and let it sit.
• Fluff before serving.

Best Result for Cooking, Matured Grains Aged not less than 2 years.
metaData.Preparation: Cooking Instructions,1.take 1.1cup of rice wash gently in 3 to 4 changes of water,2.Soak rice for 20-25 mins,3.Take 4 cups of water and bring to boil.4.Pour rice into boiling water and stir gently once. 5. Cover Utensiland keep in medium heat for 7-10 mins donot lift lid or stir.6. To checkif rice is cooked , press rice between first finger and thump.7. Remove untensilfrom the flame and drain water completly.8.Keep rice undisturbed for some time . rice is ready to be served.

metaData.Key Information:
* Please note that the quality of vacuum-packed rice remains unaffected should the packaging not arrive fully vacuum-sealed.
The paddy of Anarkali Basmati rice is haverstered from Panjab-the fertile land of five rivers at the foothill of the Himalaya, The rice crop is nutured with pure sparkling fresh waters . The rice paddies are stored for 2 years to mature and milled to arpmatic fine supper kernel long grain basmati rice.
